milestones.title: Account Verification
milestones.description: Verify customer account configuration, billing status, contact information, and service tier. Confirm all prerequisites are met before proceeding to integration setup.

milestones.title: Integration Setup & Testing
milestones.description: Test all customer webhook endpoints and API integrations in a Docker sandbox environment. Run diagnostics on any failures and create support tickets for engineering if needed.

milestones.title: Training Material Delivery
milestones.description: Generate and deliver personalised training materials covering API usage, webhook configuration, dashboard navigation, and platform best practices.

milestones.title: Mid-Onboarding Check-In
milestones.description: Analyse onboarding progress, review customer satisfaction, and address any outstanding issues or blockers. Escalate to account management if satisfaction is below threshold.

milestones.title: Final Review
milestones.description: Conduct comprehensive review of the entire onboarding journey. Verify all integrations remain healthy, summarise achievements, and outline next steps for the customer.
